summary: Honey Essentials page reorganization - All 13 tests PASSED. Page now has 3 sections (Vinyl Charms, Vinyl Protection, Light Up Your Records) with correct products, affiliate links, modals, and responsive design.

vinyl_charms_section.details: Section 1 'Vinyl Charms' header visible with correct subtext about enhancing spin experience

vinyl_charms_products.details: All 3 products visible: Mirrorball/Disco Ball Charm, TS Inspired Charms, Sabrina Charms

vinyl_protection_section.details: Section 2 'Vinyl Protection' header visible with correct subtext about protecting investments

vinyl_protection_products.details: All 3 products visible: Vinyl Record Cleaning Kit, Premium Outer Sleeves, Anti-Static Inner Sleeves

light_up_section.details: Section 3 'Light Up Your Records' header visible with LED light kit subtext

light_up_product.details: LED Platter Light Kit product visible

section_order.details: Sections in correct order: Vinyl Charms (1st) → Vinyl Protection (2nd) → Light Up (3rd)

no_holographic_sleeves.details: Old products (Cracked Ice, Lovely, Pearl Shimmer, The Armor) NOT present on page

groove_terminal_modal.details: GrooveTerminalModal opens for Vinyl Charm products (non-Amazon)

dynamic_partner_name.details: Modal header shows 'The Honey Groove × VinylCharms' - dynamic partnerLabel working correctly, NOT hardcoded 'VinylSupplyCo'

groove_gateway_modal.details: GrooveGatewayModal opens for Amazon products (Cleaning Kit)

mobile_375px.details: At 375px mobile width: grid shows 2 columns (165.5px each), sections stack properly, no horizontal overflow

context_for_next_testing_agent: Essentials page reorganized with 3 sections. VINYL_CHARMS (3 products), VINYL_PROTECTION (3 products), LIGHT_UP (1 product). GrooveTerminalModal used for non-Amazon (vinylcharms, vinylsupplyco), GrooveGatewayModal for Amazon. Dynamic partnerLabel field used for modal headers. Mobile responsive at 375px shows 2-column grid.
